first_dialog: Oh, hello there, I'd like to talk about what happened while you were mowing the lawn for our data center.
No, you're fine. However, someone broke into the data center while you were on the job and stole a graphics card. Security wasn't able to stop them and the camera footage was somehow wiped.

We're still investigating and we're increasing security at the data center and also looking into getting a replacement graphics card. Due to these extra costs, we also have to make some cuts, and one of the initial cuts is to eliminate your position.

We will be looking into figuring out how to automate lawn care with a robot in the near future to hopefully save on costs. We do apologize for your job loss though. As compensation you are entitled to a $5 Store Corp. gift card.
Anyway, I now have to make some important business calls so if you need help with anything else, please ask the other employees for assistance.
possible_dialog: *He's on his phone talking about business stuff that you don't care about*
